Solve.title: Homework Solver

Write.description: AI-powered writing assistant. Generate outlines, expand ideas, add citations, and more.

Humanize.description: Rewrite AI-generated text to sound naturally human. Bypass detectors with a single click.

Map.title: Your Knowledge Map
Map.description: Axiom tracks the subjects you query and estimates your mastery. The more you explore and solve, the smarter this map gets.
Map.noDataDesc: Start solving problems in the Chat to build your customized knowledge profile.

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.achievementsDesc: Solve problems daily to unlock badges and build your streak.

Learn.description: Your AI study companion. Ask anything — "Teach me calculus from zero".
Learn.whatToLearn: What do you want to learn?
Learn.askMeAnythingDesc: Ask me anything — "Teach me derivatives from scratch", "Explain photosynthesis", or "Help me understand recursion".
Learn.sug4: Prep me for my physics exam
